cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out when Thomas could have gone to the football field. The key here is to look at all the times he was seen doing other things and see what time slots are free for him to go to the field. Also, the field is closed after 9pm, so he has to go before that. First, let's list out all the times Thomas was seen: - 8am: Thomas woke up. So he's probably at home from 8am until... when? Well, David saw him fixing a computer at the electronic store from 8am to 10am. So from 8 to 10, he's busy there. Then Jennifer saw him at the deli from 10am to 12pm, buying lunch. So that's 10 to 12. Lisa saw him walking towards the Statue of Liberty from 12pm to 2pm. So that's 12 to 2. Sarah saw him at the electronics store buying a phone from 2pm to 5pm. So 2 to 5. Then Kimberly saw him at the bike shop from 6pm to 9pm, buying a bike. So 6 to 9. Now, the football field is closed after 9pm, so he needs to go before that.
